titulo: How to receive via PIX (Brazilian instant payment system)
descricao: Generate a PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) key to receive deposits
caminho: Depositos > Deposito PIX (Brazilian instant payment system)
passos: Enter the amount you want to receive
Check the net amount (fee already applied)
Copy the key/QR and send to payer
dica: The fee is deducted from the received amount. If you want R$ 100 net, ask the payer to send ≈ R$ 101.02.

titulo: How to pay a bank slip (boleto)
descricao: Pay bank slips directly through EvolueCash
passos: Check payee, amount and due date
dica: Use the paste icon to avoid errors. Expired slips may have recalculated interest.

titulo: How to send PIX (Brazilian instant payment system)
descricao: Send PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) to any registered key from your account
passos: Select registered PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) key
atencao: In Crypto Account (international mode with digital dollars) mode, PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) to third parties may be reversed. Use a key with the same CNPJ/CPF.
dica: In Payments Account (Brazilian mode with PIX) mode you have full freedom to send to any holder.

titulo: How to register a PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) key
descricao: Register a PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) key linked to your CNPJ
atencao: The key must be registered at a bank with the SAME CNPJ. Third-party keys are not accepted.

titulo: How to check BRL statement
descricao: Check and export your BRL account statement
dica: Each statement line already shows the fee charged — useful for reconciliation.

titulo: How to receive crypto
descricao: Receive cryptocurrencies in your EvolueCash wallet (receiving address)
passos: Select the token (BTC, ETH, USDT (digital dollar), USDC (digital dollar))
atencao: Always check TOKEN + NETWORK. Receiving USDC (digital dollar) on a different network may result in total loss — there is no reversal.

titulo: How to buy crypto
descricao: Buy cryptocurrencies using your BRL balance
dica: Confirm quickly after simulating — the quote changes continuously.

titulo: How to sell crypto
descricao: Sell cryptocurrencies and convert to BRL
atencao: To withdraw BRL to a bank account, T03 only runs Mon-Fri 9am-5pm.

titulo: How to transfer crypto
descricao: Transfer cryptocurrencies to external wallet (receiving address)s via blockchain
cuidado: on-chain (over the international network) transfer is IRREVERSIBLE. Check 3x TOKEN, NETWORK and ADDRESS. Error = total loss.
dica: Use "Favorites" for recurring addresses. Large amounts may take 20 min to 7 days for compliance (security verification).

titulo: How to convert crypto (swap (direct currency conversion))
descricao: Convert between cryptocurrencies without going through BRL
passos: In "You are sending" choose token + network + qty
dica: Useful for swap (direct currency conversion)ping BTC → USDT (digital dollar) without having to sell to BRL and buy again.

titulo: How to check crypto statement
descricao: Check and export crypto transaction history
passos: View the list (Network, Amount, hash (digital receipt), From, To)
dica: hash (digital receipt)es are clickable — they open the network explorer for on-chain (over the international network) auditing.

titulo: How to issue Static Bolepix (PIX charge, fixed amount)
descricao: Issue fixed-value invoices payable via PIX (Brazilian instant payment system)
caminho: Comex > Gerar nova cobranca > Bolepix (PIX charge) Estatico
passos: Screen 2: Payer data + PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) key + Foreign Trade
atencao: Does not replace customs obligations. May require DI/DUIMP (Brazilian customs documentation) or DU-E (Brazilian Export Declaration).
dica: Use when the amount is fixed. Before issuing, check NCM/HS of items.

titulo: How to issue Dynamic Bolepix (PIX charge, variable amount)
descricao: Issue variable-value invoices payable via PIX (Brazilian instant payment system), valid for 1 year
passos: Screen 2: Payer + PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) key
dica: Use when the amount varies (recurring billing). The payer defines the amount.

titulo: Invoice management dashboard
descricao: Manage all COMEX (Foreign Trade) invoices in a single dashboard
dica: "Use template" repeats recurring invoices without redoing fields.

titulo: How to manage PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) keys
descricao: View and copy your registered PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) keys
passos: Menu (⋮) → "Copy PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) key"
dica: To add a new key use T04. To delete, do it through the issuing bank.

titulo: How to switch between Crypto and Payments Account (Brazilian mode with PIX)
descricao: Switch between Crypto Account (international mode with digital dollars) and Payments Account (Brazilian mode with PIX) modes
passos: Click "Crypto Account (international mode with digital dollars) ⌄"
dica: Use Crypto Account (international mode with digital dollars) for Exchange and Payments Account (Brazilian mode with PIX) for daily BRL operations.

titulo: How to issue Static Bolecripto (digital dollar charge, fixed amount)
descricao: Issue fixed-value crypto invoices for international clients
atencao: Crypto payment does not automatically confirm the amount. Check hash (digital receipt) on-chain (over the international network).
dica: Before issuing, register a wallet (receiving address) for each network (My wallet). Ideal for clients outside Brazil.

titulo: How to issue Dynamic Bolecripto (digital dollar charge, variable amount)
descricao: Issue variable-value crypto invoices, valid for 1 year
dica: Use when the amount varies (variable royalties, hourly services). Valid for 1 year.

titulo: Toggle interface theme
descricao: Switch between light and dark theme
dica: Dark theme reduces eye strain. Light theme is better for screenshots.

titulo: Change interface language
descricao: Change the EvolueCash platform language
passos: Choose between English, Portuguese, Spanish, Chinese or Arabic
dica: The interface language does not affect the invoice language in COMEX (Foreign Trade) billings.

titulo: Open WhatsApp support
descricao: Contact EvolueCash support via WhatsApp
dica: There is no internal chat, ticket or email. Everything goes through WhatsApp.

titulo: View consolidated wallet (receiving address)
descricao: See all your wallet (receiving address) and payment data in one place
dica: Fastest shortcut to send data to a new client. Everything in one modal.

titulo: How to use PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) favorites
descricao: Save favorite PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) keys to speed up transfers
caminho: Saques > Saque Pix > tela 2 > '⭐ Meus Favoritos'
passos: In the withdrawal flow go to screen 2
To favorite click the ⭐ next to "Recent key"
dica: Save suppliers and employees as favorites. Reduces typing errors.

titulo: How to use recent PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) key
descricao: Use recent PIX (Brazilian instant payment system) keys for quick transfers
dica: Click the ⭐ next to the recent key to save as Favorite.

titulo: How to filter COMEX (Foreign Trade) invoices
descricao: Filter and find specific invoices in the COMEX (Foreign Trade) dashboard
passos: In Status choose from Paid, Pending, Partially Paid, Overdue
dica: "Partially Paid" status only appears in Dynamic Bolepix (PIX charge, variable amount). Combine "Status=Overdue" + "Payer=X" for delinquency by client.
